name: Hiroki Kobayashi
title: Computer Vision Researcher & AI Engineer
memberships: The Institute of Electronics, Information and Communication Engineers (IEICE)

background.description: PhD in Engineering, Chukyo University — research on industrial anomaly detection, pseudo-defect generation, and domain-specific pre-training.
MSc in Engineering, Chukyo University — research on unsupervised defect detection based on normal image generation.
BSc in Engineering, Chukyo University — research on scratch detection using realistic image generation from before/after defect pairs.
